era: Gospel/Hip-Hop. E=6 -- FIRST GOSPEL. Genre Stage 102. Tacoma. RCA Records (first major since 123). v1.49.327.

location.formative: Black church gospel tradition. Hilltop neighborhood. Tacoma music scene.
location.career: Erica Campbell. Mary Mary. Solo career. RCA Records. Grammy winner.

members.name: Erica Campbell
members.note: Tacoma. Mary Mary (duo). Solo Grammy winner (*Help*, 2014). Gospel/Hip-Hop. E=6.

associated_musicians.name: Tina Campbell
associated_musicians.relationship: Sister. Other half of Mary Mary. Gospel duo. 'Shackles (Praise You)' crossover hit.

associated_musicians.name: Mary Mary
associated_musicians.relationship: Gospel duo with sister Tina. Defined 21st-century gospel-pop. Multiple Grammy nominations.

theory_nodes.concept: FIRST GOSPEL -- Genre Stage 102. Gospel enters the Seattle 360 engine. Deep PNW roots in Black church communities of Tacoma and Seattle. Arrives through gospel/hip-hop bridge.
examples: Genre Stage 102. Gospel is the 102nd genre/subgenre.
PNW Black church tradition in Tacoma and Seattle.
Erica Campbell as the bridge artist.
theory_nodes.description: FIRST GOSPEL. Genre Stage 102. New genre enters.

genealogy.relationship: Erica Campbell at 186. Gospel enters through hip-hop bridge.

theory_nodes.concept: Gospel/Hip-Hop fusion -- gospel conviction + hip-hop production + R&B melody. 808s + gospel organ. Sacred + secular bridge. E=6 through combined tradition energy.
theory_nodes.description: Gospel/Hip-Hop fusion. Sacred meets secular. E=6.

genealogy.relationship: Erica Campbell at 186. Two traditions merge.

theory_nodes.concept: RCA Records returns -- first major label since degree 123 (Hollywood Records). 63 degrees of independence between major-label entries.
theory_nodes.description: RCA Records returns. Major label after 63 degrees.

genealogy.relationship: Erica Campbell at 186. RCA gospel division.

cross_references.relationship: TACOMA! First Tacoma entry. Campbell is the third Tacoma artist in the engine.
TACOMA! Second Tacoma entry. Same city, different tradition. Tacoma's depth.
MAJOR LABEL! Last major label before RCA. 63 degrees of independence between major labels.
CROSSOVER! Both bridge worlds. Macklemore: indie to mainstream. Campbell: sacred to secular.
